bugs.report_text: The main layout grid items are displaying in reverse order and the content arrangement is inverted.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 flex flex-row-reverse">

bugs.report_text: The booking summary card corners are not rounded and appear with sharp edges instead of smooth curves.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-800 to-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-xl p-6 sticky top-8 shadow-2xl">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-800 to-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-xx p-6 sticky top-8 shadow-2xl">

bugs.report_text: The booking summary section has excessive spacing pushing its content away from the container boundaries.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="space-y-4 mb-6 border-b border-gray-700 pb-4 m-10">

bugs.report_text: The seat information text is displayed in a color that blends into the dark background and is difficult to read.
The checkout modal is hidden behind other page elements and cannot be interacted with.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-50">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-0">

bugs.report_text: The form fields are positioned too close together with no proper spacing between them.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-12 bg-gray-800/50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-gray-700">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap- mb-12 bg-gray-800/50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-gray-700">

bugs.report_text: The seat elements are overlapping each other vertically and are positioned too close together.
bugs.neg_code: const baseClass = "w-8 h-8 rounded-t-lg text-xs flex items-center justify-center font-bold transition-all transform hover:scale-125 shadow-sm cursor-pointer duration-200";
bugs.pos_code: const baseClass = "-m-2 w-8 h-8 rounded-t-lg text-xs flex items-center justify-center font-bold transition-all transform hover:scale-125 shadow-sm cursor-pointer duration-200";

bugs.report_text: The seat elements are positioned too high and partially overlap with the row above them.
The seating grid rows are not properly aligned and content is spanning across multiple columns incorrectly.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 bg-gray-800/30 p-8 rounded-xl border border-gray-700/50">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-4 items-center gap-4 bg-gray-800/30 p-8 rounded-xl border border-gray-700/50">

bugs.report_text: The legend labels are displayed in a very dark color that is barely visible against the background.
